@startuml skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center autonumber "[0]" actor User participant "JobManager" as JM #LightBlueCircle box "" #WhiteSmoke participant Nodes end box database Storage == Initialization == User -> JobManager : submit job(IN, OUT) activate JobManager JM --> Nodes deactivate JobManager Nodes -> Storage : read IN=x Storage -\->> Nodes : return == Loop == loop multiple iterations activate Nodes note over ESDM: In Situ Post Processing rect rgb(245, 238, 197) { loop compute Node <-o+Node node <&arrow-right-up>\nwrite async\nOUT=y <> \nas N#NODENUMBER/NNODES write snapshot (async)\nto storage region RN
as file FR,N.hdf5 trigger post processing if
region affected by this step to PPL perform post processing on all files of type FR,*.(could also be done in parallel) could write result directly } deactivate Nodes rect rgb(246, 246, 246){ } @enduml
